name: The Wicked Eraser
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>邪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イレイザー
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Must be Normal Summoned/Set by Tributing 3 monsters. This card's ATK/DEF are equal to the number of cards your opponent controls x 1000. During your Main Phase: You can destroy this card. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: Destroy all cards on the field.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Must be Normal Summoned/Set by Tributing 3 monsters. This card's ATK/DEF are equal to the number of cards your opponent controls x 1000. During your Main Phase: You can destroy this card. If this card is destroyed and sent to the GY: Destroy all cards on the field.
